title: eupatorium schiedeanum var. diversifolium
intro: Eupatorium schiedeanum var. diversifolium, commonly known as Wild Joe or Mexican Joe, is a plant species belonging to the Eupatorium genus, native to Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin issues. The health benefits of Eupatorium schiedeanum var. diversifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often dried, crushed, or infused in hot water to create teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
